name: Stoveless Homemade Yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the milk and cream in a saucepan. Heat until it boils and rises in the pan.
2. Set aside to cool to 120°F.
3. Stir in the dry milk thoroughly. Cool to 115°F.
4. Place the yogurt for starter in a warmed 1-quart crockery bowl.
5. Stir in some of the milk mixture until blended.
6. Add all of the milk mixture and stir lightly.
7. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap. Wrap it in towels and place it in an insulated picnic tote.
8. Close securely. Let stand undisturbed in a warm place without drafts for 8-10 hours.
9. When yogurt is set, remove from the picnic tote and store, tightly covered, in the refrigerator.
Makes 3 1/4 cups.
